ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the state belongs to */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State abbreviation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "municipalities" (
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each municipality */,
  "municipality_name" TEXT /* Name of the municipality */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the municipality belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("municipality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suburbs" (
  "suburb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suburb */,
  "suburb_name" TEXT /* Name of the suburb */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the municipality the suburb belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suburb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "suburb_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the suburb the neighborhood belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the property in square meters */,
  "baths" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "beds" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the property */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the property was listed */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the property was listed */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the property is located */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the property is located */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the municipality where the property is located */,
  "suburb_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the suburb where the property is located */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood where the property is located */,
  "postcode" INTEGER /* Postal code of the property */,
  "price" REAL /* Sale price of the property */,
  "prediction" REAL /* Predicted sale price of the property */,
  "construction_year" INTEGER /* Year the property was constructed */,
  "renovation_year" INTEGER /* Year the property was last renovated */,
  "parking_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of parking spaces in the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_municipality_id FOREIGN KEY ("municipality_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_suburb_id FOREIGN KEY ("suburb_id") REFERENCES suburbs ("suburb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the property was sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price the property was sold for */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the real estate agent who sold the property */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the buyer who purchased the property */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the seller who sold the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "agent_license" TEXT /* License number of the agent */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agency the agent belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "agency_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agency */,
  "agency_email" TEXT /* Email address of the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "buyer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the buyer */,
  "buyer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the buyer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "seller_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the seller */,
  "seller_email" TEXT /* Email address of the seller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, agent, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property predicted */,
  "predicted_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted sale price of the property */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date the trend was recorded */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average property price in the region */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in property prices */,
  "forecast_price" REAL /* Forecasted property price for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economy_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economy indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economy indicator */,
  "indicator_date" TEXT /* Date the indicator was recorded */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the economy indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)
